caption: In a kitchen setting, a person's hands are seen mixing ingredients in a large metal bowl. The person is adding light-brown, granular food, possibly oats or crushed nuts, into the bowl from an external source. Two smaller containers—a white plate and a red bowl—containing more of the same granular substance sit on a wooden surface next to the main bowl. The person uses their hands to stir and combine the ingredients, with the movement becoming more active as the sequence progresses. Each frame features a logo in the upper-left corner with a stylized icon and the text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION". The lighting is bright, and the focus remains on the process of mixing the food within the bowl on the wooden tabletop.
